entry.title: Re: EWM - Method or function module to delete stock refer...
entry.content:
Hi 

Delete stock identification can be set at storage type level and you see its logic then it says 

This checkbox is used if you want to delete stock identification after a product is putaway into the storage type. Stock identification identifies a stock or product with all its unique attributes, such as quantity, batch, or stock type. This indicator must be set for all final putaway storage types. If this indicator isn’t set for final putaway storage types, then you’ll get an error while saving the storage type settings.

If you check it will delete. so why you need function module ?

Also at  warehouse process type level we have setting in customizing we can select no stock identification for it 

It will also help you.

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Migration of statistical projects isn't possible due to missing profit center
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Using the Migration Cockpit, we're currently migrating statistical projects from our SAP ECC system to our SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud, using the Direct Transfer approach and Migration Object "PS - Project". We've noticed one thing though: we can't migrate statistical projects that don't have a profit center associated to them. Whenever we try to do it, the Migration Cockpit throws some errors (as "empty/missing profit center").

Using transaction CJ20N though, we can create these statistical projects, with no profit centers, without any issues! Our query then is:

  • How do we avoid these errors? Shouldn't we be able to directly migrate statistical projects without profit centers using the Migration Cockpit, since the respective transaction allows such thing?

If it helps, our S/4HANA release is 2023. Thanks!

Best regards,
Data migration experts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration of statistical projects isn't possible due...
entry.content:
Note: all documentation mentioned is available in the end of this message.

 

Dear experts,

As you can check in the Migration Object's official documentation for your SAP S/4HANA release and migration method, there are some prerequisites to migrate the Migration Object "PS - Project", one of them being the migration or already defined settings of "CO - Cost Center" in the system.

If the prerequisites section of "CO - Cost Center" is also checked, you'll notice that "CO - Profit center" is mandatory to maintain it in the system. As a question of hierarchy then:

  1. "CO - Profit center" is mandatory for "CO - Cost Center".
  2. "CO - Cost Center" is mandatory for "PS - Project".
  3. Thus, "CO - Profit center" is mandatory for "PS - Project".

This means that:

  • When using the Migration Object "PS - Project", profit centers are a requirement to migrate statistical projects to the system.

Considering this, you might question:

  • Should that be the case when I can use t-code CJ20N to create statistical projects without profit centers?

And the answer yes, since the requirements of each Migration Object available in the Migration Cockpit are maintained by the respective business area/line of business, which won't necessarily fully match the requirements to create such data objects directly using the available transactions or Fiori apps. Even the Staging Tables variant of the Migration Object "PS - Project" requires the maintenance of "CO - Profit center" in the system.

I hope this helps with your query! I'll leave all documentation links below:

  • PS - Project (Direct Transfer) | SAP Help Portal
  • CO - Cost center | SAP Help Portal
  • PS - Project (Staging Tables) | SAP Help Portal

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: ASA 17.0.10: Question about calling external web serv...
entry.content: I understand correctly that I will have to recode binary data into BASE64 (Function BASE64_ENCODE) ? P.S. I honestly thought that if you pass long binary data to a web function (in my example WebTest2Run), the recoding will be done automatically, as well as adding the necessary parts of the request header and body. But judging by your answer I was wrong.

Also, it would be nice to have a dedicated authorization object to create future public views. We don't want to create them with Adapt UI in the DEV system but would like to limit just the creation of public views to some "key-users" in QA/PROD.

entry.title: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS TS 6.1 ?

On the available manuals and knowledge books, the product compatibility doesn't say much:

Table 3: Mainframe Connect Options release compatibilityComponentRelease level

Mainframe Connect Client Option

15.0

Mainframe Connect Server Option

15.0

Mainframe Connect DB2 UDB Option

15.0

Mainframe Connect DirectConnect for z/OS Option

15.0

Could you please point me to the doc where it says which CICS versions are compatible?

SAP Cloud ALM for Operations Expert Portal

entry.title: How to add equipment in logsheet
entry.content:
Equipment was not displayed in the logsheet because, during the equipment transfer process, the location status was mistakenly set to 'dismantled' from 12.11.2024. The equipment's final location was marked as 'installed' only on 28.11.2024. As result, the logsheet does not show data for 16 days.

Please suggest what actions should be taken to resolve this issue.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP Plant Connectivity

entry.title: Re: ASA 17.0.10: Question about calling external web serv...
entry.content:
This is how I have got it working, ultimately however you do it, in whatever language, you will need the client to conform, I guess you might have just use languages that have libraries available where someone else has done all this as reusable code?

Personally I like have full control over the raw transmission.   

You will need to use whatever encoding the endpoint is expecting, it isn't always BASE64. 
You can read more about encoding here: https://www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc1341/5_Content-Transfer-Encoding.html

But yes if you haven't stored the data in your tables BASE64 encoded and they want BASE64 encoded you will need to use BASE64_ENCODE()

entry.title: Re: Stock room management vs Basic EWM vs EWM
entry.content:
Hello @stretchand 

Ad 1. Stock Room Management is not being phased out right now. It is supported. However I don't think it's going to last forever. Sooner or later SAP is going to drop LE-WM / Stock Room Management in S/4HANA in favor of EWM.

Ad 2. Having said that, Stock Room Management is still a valid option. There are support notes detailing LE-WM functionality covered by Stock Room Management license, e.g. pick waves are excluded.

Ad 3. Roughly basic EWM covers the same functionalities as Stock Room Management e.g. pick waves are excluded both from Stock Room Management and basic EWM. Again support notes provides details on what's not allowed in basic EWM.

In short, if you think about a new implementation, I'd suggest basic EWM instead of Stock Room Management.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS VIEW TO FETCH SUM OF QTY FROM MSEG TABLE FOR...
entry.content: how about doing the calculation creditDebitQuantity first? then do the aggregation.

you have to check the size of your range before use it

entry.title: Re: EWM - Method or function module to delete stock refer...
entry.content:
Hi Rashid,
thank you for your answer.
We have storage types where the stock reference is not deleted. Instead of transferring these to other storage types and storing them back again, we would like to delete the stock reference where the HU or item is located. So to summarize again:
The stock is located in a storage type where the checkbox is not set. We would like to execute a function so that the stock reference is deleted.

entry.title: Re: Leading zeros in product master
entry.content: You can implement your own logic to handle leading zero with BADI_MATN1.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi, I am from Japan.
I would like to learn more about SAP and its products.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
@AbhishekSharma - Open your landscape file in a text (or XML) editor, you will find a line that is attempting  to INCLUDE that file. Just delete that line.

If your Windows setup really does use the Global Landscape file, then you will have to copy that file to your Mac too and change the path on the INCLUDE line to point to this Global XML.

entry.title: Die beliebtesten SAP Schulungen 2024: Klassenraumschulungen, Live Sessions und mehr
entry.content:
SAP bietet eine Vielzahl von Schulungsformaten, um den unterschiedlichen Bedürfnissen von Lernenden gerecht zu werden. Hier sind die beliebtesten SAP-Schulungen im Jahr 2024. Ich möchte damit eine Orientierung geben – vielleicht ist ja eine Anregung für den einen oder die andere dabei.

 

SAP Schulungen im Klassenraum

Präsenzschulungen in SAP-Trainingszentren wie im schönen Walldorf ermöglichen direkten Kontakt zu erfahrenen Trainern. Die praxisorientierten Kurse fördern Austausch, den Praxistransfer mit Schulungssystemen und die Klärung von Fragen. Viele schätzen immer noch das geführte Lernen. Anbei die beliebtesten SAP Kurse 2024 – eine komplette Übersicht gibt es hier im SAP Schulungskatalog.

 

Kurskürzel

Kursname

Link

ADM100

System Administration for SAP S/4HANA

Link

ADM940

SAP S/4HANA Cloud - System Administration

Link

ADM945

SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Security Administration

Link

ADMCLD

SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Data Lifecycle Management

Link

BC400

ABAP Programming for SAP S/4HANA

Link

BC401

ABAP Development for SAP HANA

Link

BW410

SAP BW/4HANA - Data Warehousing

Link

CLD900

SAP Cloud Platform - Introduction

Link

EWM100

Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) - Basics

Link

EWM110

Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) - Advanced Topics

Link

HA200

SAP HANA 2.0 - Installation and Administration

Link

HR050

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Essentials

Link

HR305

SAP SuccessFactors Performance and Goals Management

Link

HR400

SAP SuccessFactors Learning Management

Link

S4500

SAP S/4HANA - Financial Accounting

Link

S4520

SAP S/4HANA - Management Accounting

Link

S4550

SAP S/4HANA - Sales and Distribution

Link

S4605

SAP S/4HANA - Procurement

Link

S4D400

SAP S/4HANA - Customizing for Financial Accounting

Link

S4D430

SAP S/4HANA - Customizing for Sales and Distribution

Link

 

Live Sessions in SAP Learning Hub

Der SAP Learning Hub bietet interaktive Live-Sessions, die von SAP-Expert:innen geleitet werden. Mit über 4.200 Sessions in verschiedenen Sprachen können Teilnehmende flexibel lernen und sich auf spezifische Themen konzentrieren. Dabei gibt es unterschiedliche Typen von Live-Sessions: Expert Deep Dive, Get Started zur Einführung, Stay Certified, structured Guided Learning mit spez. Bootcamp Angeboten, sowie What’s New. Hier ist die Übersicht über alle Live Sessions – anbei die beliebtesten im Jahr 2024.

  • Getting Started with ABAP Cloud Development
  • In-Depth with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
  • Extending SAP S/4HANA Apps with Key-User Extensibility
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series - Artificial Intelligence & Technologies
  • AI & Intelligent Technology - Product Expert Training HY2 2024
  • Getting Started with SAP Build Apps
  • Getting Started with Development Using SAP BTP ABAP Environment
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 - Early Release Series Artificial Intelligence & Technologies
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 - Early Release Series Extensibility
  • Modernizing Custom ABAP Code
  • SAP S/4HANA - Master Data, Migration Cockpit & Test Data Refresh - Product Expert Training HY2 2024
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 - SAP Activate, SAP Cloud ALM, and Test Automation Tool
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 Early Release Series - SAP User Experience
  • SAP Signavio Process Navigator - Product Expert Training HY2 2024
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 - SAP Activate, SAP Cloud ALM, and Test Automation Tool
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 Early Release Series - Finance
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 Early Release Series - Sales
  • Executive Introduction & Product Strategy Update – Product Expert Training HY2 2024
  • Partner Bootcamp - Migrating SAP HANA on-premise to SAP HANA Cloud
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series - Finance

Zum Nutzen dieser Session benötigt man eine Subscription des SAP Learning Hub. 

 

Schulungssysteme in SAP Learning Hub

In SAP Learning Hub haben Nutzende auch Zugang zu vorkonfigurierten Trainingssystemen inkl. Übungen, um das Gelernte direkt anzuwenden. Diese vorkonfigurierten Systeme bieten eine sichere Umgebung für das Ausprobieren von SAP-Lösungen und dem Aufbau von Kompetenzen. Hier eine Liste der beliebtesten Schulungssysteme 2024. Per se sind dies natürlich keine Schulungen, jedoch sehr wichtig für das Verständnis und die Anwendung bei Administration, Konfiguration und weiteren Aktivitäten von SAP Experten.

 

Kurskürzel

Kursname

S4H00

SAP S/4HANA - Grundlagen

S4D400

SAP S/4HANA - Customizing für Finanzwesen

THR81

SAP SuccessFactors - Recruiting

S4500

SAP S/4HANA - Finanzbuchhaltung

S4F12

SAP S/4HANA - Financial Accounting for SAP Fiori

S4605

SAP S/4HANA - Procurement

EWM100

Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) - Basics

S4C03

SAP S/4HANA - Customizing für Vertrieb

S4F10

SAP S/4HANA - Financial Management

S4C01

SAP S/4HANA - Sales and Distribution

HA400

SAP HANA - Administration

CLD200

SAP Cloud Platform - Development

EWM110

Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) - Advanced

THR80

SAP SuccessFactors - Performance Management

BC400

ABAP Programming for SAP S/4HANA

Eine Übersicht über alle SAP Schulungssysteme ist hier zu finden.

 

Kostenfreie SAP Learning Journeys

SAP bietet kostenfreie Learning Journeys an, die Text, Video und Quizzes beinhalten und ideal für Selbstlerner sind, um sich in ein Thema einzuarbeiten. Sie haben die openSAP Kurse abgelöst und bieten eine einfache kostenfreie Möglichkeit zum Lernen. Anbei die Übersicht über die beliebtesten im Jahr 2024.

  • Discovering SAP Business Technology Platform
  • Acquiring Core ABAP Skills
  • Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Exploring SAP Cloud ERP
  • Managing Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Outlining the Financial Accounting Overview in SAP S/4HANA
  • Learning the Basics of SAP Fiori
  • Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud
  • Practicing Clean Core Extensibility for SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Developing with SAP Integration Suite
  • Learning the Basics of ABAP Programming on SAP BTP
  • Exploring the SAP Business AI Portfolio
  • Getting Started with Support from SAP (Support Accreditation)
  • Positioning the SAP Business Technology Platform
  • Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA
  • Discovering End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise
  • Discovering SAP Activate - Implementation Tools and Methodology
  • Managing Business Processes with SAP Signavio Solutions

Ich hoffe, dass ich damit einige Inspirationen geben konnte – probiert gerne das eine oder andere aus.

Wer Up-To-Date bleiben möchte, abonniert am besten den monatlichen SAP Training Newsletter. Dort werden regelmäßig Neuigkeiten rund um SAP Lernangebote jeglicher Methodik geteilt.

Viel Spaß beim Lernen!

entry.title: Re: How to build SOAP service in SAP Cloud Integration, Part 1
entry.content:
Hi Josua,

In that case you should call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT right after the first call, reusing the same session. Ensure the session context (typically represented by cookies or other session identifiers) is maintained between the two calls. Click somewhere in the canvas and set HTTP Session Reuse to On Integration Flow. This will keep the calls in the same session.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors People Analytics (Stories): How to create change report (current vs previous valu
entry.content:
@vrajhendhran I like this requirement 🙂
I would have to think about it and come back to you with another blog post as the logic would be different the one presented here. I sure it is feasible but it will be definately be more complex (and maybe more fun!). Cheers!

entry.title: Re: pcr payroll
entry.content: If you run a Payroll Simulation for one employee, with the "Display Log" box checked, you will be able to drill down into your schema and look at what happens when a PCR is called by function PIT. In the Input Table to your PCR, the entries are sorted first by ESG and then by WT (in ascending order). The entries will be processed in that Order, and WT 1001 will be processed after WT 1000 if both have the same ESG split, and even if the appear in the reverse order in the IT, if both WTs do not share the same splits it is often impossible to read the values of the other WT. Therefore, a first PCR will often be created to transfer into a temporary variable the values of a WT (using Opeartion ADDWT&1001). Then, in the second PCR where you will process WT 1000 specifically, you will then use the following Operations in sequence: NUM=& 1001 MULTI NAA AMT?KZ50K (where Z50K is a constant in table T511K with a value of 50000) and if the result is > use Operation ADDWT * but if it is anything else ( *, or = and <) then do nothing WT 1000 will disapear from the output table.

entry.title: Re: Held purchase requisitions need to be seen throug trx...
entry.content:
Hello @BrianJ1 

As per SAP Help on Park and Hold:

Held purchase requisitions are by definition not complete, may still contain errors, they are only temporarily saved. Thus, they are not relevant to MRP. I'd suggest your customer start using park instead of hold, if they want to see not posted purchase requisitions in MRP.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Unable to purchase SAP certification exam
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I ask SAP. Method is to contact them they will share the payment details and you can pay by NEFT. They can tell you the procedure once you logged a ticket with them.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: web client sap b1 public view or Analysis for all user
entry.content:
Dear @harryntnguyen , 

I hope I understood your question properly.

In general, you can open a query as a list view > save it as a public view and set it as the default view for the query.

This way all users who are authorized for queries should be able to access it.

Recommend to have a look at: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/exploring-sap-business-one-web-client - there are analytics-specific lessons.

regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Syntax near CardCode
entry.content:
Hi,

hana sql syntax

SELECT "CardCode" FROM "OCRD"

entry.title: Re: How do I assign BRF+ 'configuration' in the MDG Conso...
entry.content:
Hi Browning,

You can use the IMG activity "Define Rules Using the Business Rule Framework plus" to create BRF+ Rules for your processes. All relevant and active BRF+ rules will be executed during "Update" step. You will find further information in the help for above mentioned IMG activity.

 Please be aware that the correct function needs to be used which is relevant for Update-Adapter:

  • e.g. The naming convention for the system generated functions is MDC_<abreviation of process step>_FOR_<table name>,  for example: MDC_STD_FOR_BUT_ADRC_PRC. 

Just a further information: There is also Derivation functionality available starting with SAP Master Data Governance on S/4HANA 2021 Feature Pack Stack 01:  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/automate-your-master-data-process-with-derivation-scenarios-in-sap-master/ba-p/13538990 

Best regards,

Christina Lindner

entry.title: /SCWM/RWEIGHT_VOLUME_UPDATE in Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are getting dump, ASSERTION_FAILED when confirming Warehouse tasks. This is in our Test system but we also received it in our Customizing system.

I have found the same issue in on-prem/private cloud through OSS notes to run SE38 /SCWM/RWEIGHT_VOLUME_UPDATE. Unfortunately, this doesn't seem available in Public. 

The specific line of code failing seems to be related to weight. We have not adjusted weight since initial upload.

IF ls_capa-weight IS NOT INITIAL.
ASSERT <dlagp>-unit_w = ls_capa-unit_w.

 

Has anyone faced this issue?

entry.title: Re: Unable to purchase SAP certification exam
entry.content: Hi Rishav, thank you for your valuable comment.

entry.title: Re: Unable to purchase SAP certification exam
entry.content: Hi Rishav, thank you for your valuable comment. Please guide me how to contact SAP.

entry.title: Issue with User Creation for SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently facing an issue with the SAP Mobile Start application related to user creation through the Business Technology Platform (BTP). When we create a user via BTP, there seems to be no verification method in place, and therefore users cannot proceed with the process. As a result, if the user is not already an SAP user and is utilizing services like Gmail or Hotmail, they are required to create an SAP Universal ID.

I’m seeking advice on whether there is a solution or a proper approach to handle this situation. Is it mandatory for each employee to create their own SAP Universal ID, or is there an alternative method to simplify this process? For example, when I add an email to BTP, something like sending a link directly to the user's email address to create their account with a password.

Any insights or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Link btw Settlement Document (External Agent) & Source Billing document(s)
entry.content:
Dear all,
I need help cause I could not find any information about this issue: The requirement is: to print the original customer invoice informations( Invoice Nr, items, prices) in item level in the settlement document for external agent (Commission). The problem is that I cann't find any linkage between the settlment document and the source billing document(customent invoice) on which this settlement (commission for the external agent) was based. 

Does anybody know how can this problem be solved or any suggestions for a alternativ solution?

Thank you all in advane. 

Best regards 

Saida

entry.title: how transaction key KBS trigger in MIRO
entry.content:
Dear All,

There is one purchase order with account assignment for a internal order.

i am wondering how transaction key KBS trigger in MIRO. here is transaction

Goods Receipt:

GR QTY= 25,416.65GR Value=  45,922,805Unit Price= 1,882.72Exchange Rate:1,806.80

Invoice Receipt:

 IR QTY= 15,250.00IR Value= 28,212,500Exchange Rate:1,850.00

i did manual calculation, FX Gain/Loss should be

 

IR QTY * GR FX Rate = 15,250.00 * 1,806.80=28,711,482

28,711,482 - 28,212,500 <IR Value> =  498,981 

systen created additional entry for KBS with amount: 434,167 from FX gain/loss

System created entries:

Cr. AP........................................ 27,507,187 (KBS)

Dr. GR/IR Clearing...................... 28,711,482 (WRX)

Cr. FX Rate Gail/Loss................. 64,814 (KDM)

Cr. G/L Account Expense...........  434,167 (KBS)

Cr. Withholding Tax...................  705,313 (WIT)

Please kindly help to explain.

thanks,

RG

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Context Help in SAP Enable Now Producer 2406
entry.content: Hello UlrG7, I had this issue happen once several years ago, where the Export Context File-Parameter prompt with checkboxes to select which parameters to include in the context.html did not display. My notes from that time say "If this prompt does not display, you may have selected a folder that is too high in the Workarea tree, containing too many folders and items for the program to consider when generating the context.html file. This can also happen if you have selected a folder which contains many subfolders of migrated legacy content (such as uPerform or Captivate) or other content that was created outside of SAP Enable Now. Make sure you are selecting a Group folder which contains ONLY Referenced Book Pages, Simulations, and other Group folders (that is, native SAP Enable Now content)." I also seem to remember that if an author adds a hard return while typing context codes manually in the Screen IDs property field in Producer, that can cause the problem too, but I tested just now and it makes no difference, so maybe that's not an issue anymore. On me.sap.com, Knowledge Base Article 2212273 also mentions that "NOTE: This dialog box populates with available parameters from the recorded context. If the content has no recorded context, this dialog box [the Export Context File-Parameter prompt] will be blank and it is not possible to continue configuring Context Sensitive Help." In your Producer properties pane for an SEN object like a Simulation, the Web Contexts (SAP Companion) > Screen IDs field needs to have TCODE= (something) in it, for at least one of your Simulations. If they're all blank, which I have seen happen when the content developers did not have their Producers and their target SAP GUI set up correctly, then there's no context in the content to be generated into the context.html file. But the KBA seems to say that the Export Context File-Parameter prompt will be blank, not that it doesn't display at all. If it's not displaying at all for you, I would recommend putting in an SAP Support ticket.

entry.title: Re: Parts Interchangeability in Process orders
entry.content: After a lot of research and testing, I have determined that Parts Interchangeability does not work for Process Orders.  The functionality only works on Production Orders.

entry.title: Async onInit - Route not trigerred
entry.content:
Hi All,

In my UI5 app, I am loading a few fragments conditionally in the onInit method using async/await and hence have declared the onInit method as async . The fragments load fine but the onRouteMatch method I try to run after await does not trigger at all. If I remove all await statements from the code , the the onRouteMatch triggers fine . 

Can someone kindly suggest what could be going wrong here .

Thanks ,

Himanshu

entry.title: Is it possible to use SVT classic along with the rest of the PC "new" features?
entry.content:
Dear Community 

I'm implementing SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance, OnPrem release 2023. In face of the answer provided for this question and regarding the latest information about S/4HANA for Product Compliance (PC "new) released in the EHS and PC Info days, last September I'm asking the experts: 

Is it possible to use SVT classic along with the rest of the PC "new" features? Even with its current limitations.
What are the minimum requirements to do so? 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning - Unable to SAVE
entry.content: I would check in a second browser tab in the files area which user has last modified the story, check the "Changed By" column.

entry.title: configurable products and dynamic pricing
entry.content:
Hello, I want to work with configurable products, and I have the requirement that the product price must change based on one of the fields that make the product configurable. Is there anything OOTB to model pricing like this? Can anyone recommend a way to approach this?

The field would be "number of days" for a digital product, but the number of values can range from 1 to 90 or even higher.

Thank you.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Delete Primary Values from Numeric Point Chart
entry.content:
Hi Edgar, 

worked perfectly.

Thank you very much.

BR

Lorenz

entry.title: SCIM API Support for Users and Groups in SAP Ariba Applications
entry.content:
As promised, this is a information sharing blog and follow up blog to my previous post:

Extending Cloud Integration of SAP IAG to SAP Arib... - SAP Community

SAP Ariba applications now supports User and Group integration via SCIM protocol and it has been made generally available in August 2024. What does this mean then. I will summarize some key points and also point you towards - Getting Started with the SAP Ariba SCIM API | SAP Help Portal. 

  • For all your SAP Ariba applications (Buying, Sourcing, Supplier Management, Contracts etc), you can utilize SCIM based used user and groups provisioning/assignment. (both for read and write operations) 
  • You can access and enable these APIs via SAP Ariba APIs Portal under Procurement or Strategic Sourcing as "SCIM API for User and Group Master Data". The SAP Ariba SCIM API is a REST API based on the SCIM (System for Cross-domain Identity Management) 2.0 specification.
  • Let it be SAP Ariba Sourcing/Contract sites (also knows as Realms) or let it be SAP Ariba Buying sites with various variants (SAP, Peoplesoft and Generic), you can utilize the SCIM API. SAP variant has most number of business attribute coverage where as Peoplesoft and Generic variant have limited attributes coverage at this point of time.
    • Consider a scenario that you have a Parent SAP Ariba Buying site which is of Generic variant and Child site(s) is(are) of SAP variant, then you can first make the baseline general user provisioning to the Parent site as it does not require much of business attributes, and then make another provisioning call to the Child site with required business attribute. This would help the user (end user) perform their business operations based on their attributes 
  • SCIM API can be used with or without IPS and IAG, though SAP recommends to use IPS based flow for better integration architecture.  A suggestive flow is mentioned below for example. Please note: SAP IAG (Identity and access governance) is still undergoing some enhancements to support all business attributes out of the box. 

You will also find that the rate limit of this API is greatly improved than previous version and much more additional functionalities.

Please check the official documentation for restrictions on the API functionality. And please note that this Blog is not a official product documentation but rather a quick guide on this topic. Kindly stay updated with the official documentation.

If you are interested knowing more about this topic, please reach out to your SAP Ariba representative.

Thank you and I hope this adds some clarity to current state of this API and user/group provisioning in SAP Ariba applications.

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87011964 display ANLA-GDGRP and ANLB-NDJAR
entry.content: Did you already try Application Id F1617 or any other standard balances available in the linked search page?

entry.title: Re: How to manage the challenges during the Back-to-school Season
entry.content: thanks

entry.title: Re: What Higher Education Can Do to Deliver Better Outcomes
entry.content: Higher education plays a crucial role in shaping better outcomes for students and society. By focusing on personalized learning, universities can address individual needs, enhancing both engagement and success. Collaborations with industry partners can also bridge the gap between academic theory and real-world practice, making graduates more employable. Furthermore, integrating technology into learning experiences allows for innovative solutions. Resources like https://edubirdie.com/humanize-ai-text provide students with tools to improve their work and academic performance. Ultimately, by fostering critical thinking, creativity, and adaptability, higher education institutions contribute to a more skilled and versatile workforce.

entry.title: Re: list report search on composite entity
entry.content:
STRING_AGG would only solve part of the challenge anyway.

as far as i can see, the problem has two parts:

  1. A field ist needed to Filter against.     Tried a _B.BNAME as FILTER in der View, but this will change cardinality and the navigation to the object page went wrong.   A SELECT DISTINCT does not change it
  2. A Result Column is needed to show the entity data. Do I have to display all BNAMEs for an A to be style guide conform or is the appropriate filter attribute sufficient? 

Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 in Canada is it possible to turn of AP Invoice...
entry.content:
Hello, 
Please check this KBA which describes how tax amounts are distributed on lines. 3379849 - How is the Tax Rounding Difference allocated to line item row levels?

Please note that for a document it is the document total tax amount that takes precedent should there be a difference to the total of the lines. Hence the logic described in the KBA. 

I hope that helps, 

Jesper

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 in Canada is it possible to turn of AP Invoice Tax rounding
entry.content: Is your scenario similar to the described here? https://me.sap.com/notes/3379849/E

entry.title: Re: Sysdate On default Prompt Date on SAP Universe

SAP.EVENEMENT.DATE_EVT>= (add_months( @Prompt('Date: ', 'D', , mono, free, persistent),-18)+1)

entry.title: Re: list report search on composite entity
entry.content:
With BNAME added to A, the cardinality is bound to change and for the filter to work out of the box for BNAME it has to be added to A. I would suggest going for a custom entity in this case where you can handle the filter in your code. You would need a dummy field called BNAME in A. The value entered in the filter would be available in the implementation of the custom entity and can be used to filter B first and then select A based on that before populating the result.

Custom Entity

entry.title: SAP Community Call for ALM – APJ edition
entry.content:
The monthly webinar - focusing on the APJ region and timezone - provides everything you need to know about SAP's Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) offerings. Get the latest news and regional updates directly from SAP's topic experts!

By attending this call you have the chance to stay updated about what's going on with SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Focused Run.

For slides and recordings click here. 

Join the session: https://sap-se.zoom.us/j/99992206738?pwd=kaKrYUZI9wqKow9HTxhjcvgglbpaO4.1

entry.title: Error Message No. G06221 - Error while calling ANST Note Search WebService.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expertise,

I have this Chronologies:

I am running COI (consolidation of investment) task in consolidation monitor - Task 2101 CoI

Document Type 3B Auto CoI adj. (30/AUT)

Then this error message occurred:
Statistical items were generated, please repeat execution

Message No. G06221

Diagnosis

At least one statistical item was generated during the current execution
of the consolidation of investments task.

System Response

The system cannot check the document completely and therefore prevents
the posting.

All task in data monitor and all previous task that already run before this COI task in consolidation monitor is successfully run.

Please kindly need the helps.

Thank You.

Best Regards,

SAP GR Consultant

entry.title: Re: The use of Class CL_APS_BC_SCOPE_CHANGE_API is not pe...
entry.content:
Hi All,

The tutorial is marked as "Requires Customer/Partner License" and therefore it can not be performed on the trial version of SAP BTP ABAP environment.

If you check in step 2 with trial SAP BTP environment you will get the message:

"You do not have permission to Access the Manage LaunchPad Pages App".

I hope that somebody of SAP fix that or give us another way to continue with the exercises 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Error CVIS_UI_GENERIC001 while creating a BP
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your reply. I'm sorry that the solution is just a workaround for your issue.
May I please ask you to request the feature you miss on the Customer Influence Portal? We continuously review and prioritize feature requests based on customer feedback.

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Is it possible to change the ordered material on a subcontracting PO?
entry.content:
Hello,

We use subcontracting POs for parts repair. Usually, the ordered material and the component are the same, so we ship and receive the same material. 

However, it is not uncommon for the repair vendor to inform us that they will upgrade the part. When this happens, we have to change the ordered material, so we receive the correct part into stock. The component does not change.

Following standard SAP, it is not possible to change the ordered material after the component has shipped (error message MEPO086), so we delete the original line and create a new line for the corrected material. Unfortunately, this causes inbound invoice IDocs to fail, because the reference PO line in the IDoc has been deleted.

I am a functional consultant, not a developer... Has anyone found a way around this via development, so that the ordered material can be changed without having to create a new line or change the components?

entry.title: Re: PCRE regular expression to validate that semi-colons have separated a string of emails
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Thanks for your consideration. I'm happy I found a solution to my question. I will share the findings with a practical example. 

Data: lv_email_str type string,
      lv_regex type string.
lv_email_str = `johndoe@gmail.com; kimteddy@yahoo.com; maria_stella@outlook.com`.
lv_regex = `(?!.*;$)^([-\w]+?@\w+\.\w+(?:\s*;\s*)?)+$`.

IF matches( val = lv_email_str pcre = lv_regex ).
****True****
ELSE.
****False****
ENDIF. 
Note: The only special character allowed here besides @, is the semi-colon and only as a separator between emails.

Hi Experts, Thank you for your consideration. I’m pleased to have found a solution to my question. I will share my findings with a practical example.

entry.title: Re: SAP learning exercise- no access

entry.title: Re: Tutorials for Creating a full stack CAP application u...
entry.content:
Did you have a look at https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-cap-samples/? SAP uses as an example of how you can structure different component in different projects (even though in this example it is in on repo).  

You can have a look at he CAP website or DJ Adams posts and videos to learn more about plugins. 

I personally use the plugin mechanism to string together 9 modules. 

If you don't want to deploy them together but see each one as a standalone micro service that build on it, you can use the MTA and some destination magic to make that happen.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Thanks Joe,

I am also interested in knowing when the 2025 federal tax tables will be released by BSI.

Debbie

entry.title: Re: Why does 0RECORDMODE exist ? What is its usecase ?
entry.content:
It's needed for deltas, so the before, after and reverse/delete images can be identified and processed accordingly.

For example in a DSO with Changelog without the corresponding before/after pairs, it would not be possible to rollback requests, since then the system would not know what the previous value was.

entry.title: Looking for Job opportunities in SAP Successfactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

I have 4 yrs exp in HR and as SAP SF End User(Fieldglass). I am trying to shift my career into SAP. I am trained and certified in SAP SF Employee Central and Time Management modules. Looking for some real-time experience. Pls let me know if you have any job opportunities or internships available in Hyderabad, India or Remote. I can join immediately.  

#SAPSuccessfactors #Employeecentral #jobs

Thanks in Advance.
